title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 534.540 - Proceedings on default of defendant
text:
534.540.  Proceedings on default of defendant. — In case of a judgment by default, a jury, or the court if no jury be required, shall assess the monthly value of the premises, and the damages and judgment shall be rendered on the verdict accordingly.
(RSMo 1939 § 2901) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2515; 1919 § 3063; 1909 § 7725
